commands.name: export
commands.summary: Export the active Causal DAG as HTML, JSON, SVG, DOT, Markdown, or summary.

commands.name: view
commands.summary: Show the active path, open frontier, and dead ends without writing a file.

commands.name: update
commands.summary: Run one durable checkpointed Causal DAG projection tick.

commands.name: catch-up
commands.summary: Run bounded Causal DAG update ticks until caught up or budgeted.

commands.name: observe
commands.summary: Project observer-produced Causal DAG hints over bounded provenance.

commands.name: research-enable
commands.summary: Use the durable research record and deterministic v4 Causal DAG projection for this session.

commands.name: refresh
commands.summary: Increment, reframe, or finalize the active semantic Causal DAG.

commands.name: observer-brief
commands.summary: Build a bounded companion AgentTask for observing a provenance window.

commands.name: observer-apply
commands.summary: Fold a round-observer companion's hints output into a Causal DAG projection.

commands.name: record-observation
commands.summary: Record post-hoc observer audit metadata for an existing Causal DAG artifact.
